name: Add Product Condition to a Google Shopping Feed
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Request a data service job"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are two steps required to complete this process:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1061-add-product-condition-to-a-google-shopping-feed#add-condition-to-products", "children": [{"text": "Add Condition to Products"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1061-add-product-condition-to-a-google-shopping-feed#add-condition-to-the-google-shopping-export", "children": [{"text": "Add Condition to the Google Shopping Export"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Condition to Products"}], "data-id": "add-condition-to-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Each item you upload to Google will need its condition specified. If you don't already have this data entered, the best way to go about it is to add a custom field."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products#add-product-categories-to-products-via-import", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": " to create a custom field. Give it a relevant name, like "}, {"text": "Condition", "bold": true}, {"text": " so it's easy to locate later."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You now need to populate this field on all of your products. Navigate to the "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open a product by clicking on the "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the condition into the custom fieldyou created."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed1.05T5g00000w6XTaEAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 249}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and repeat these steps for all of the products you upload to Google."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can also update products in bulk by using the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/501-product-export-wizard", "children": [{"text": "export"}]}, {"text": " and "}, {"type": "a", "url": {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Condition to the Google Shopping Export"}], "data-id": "add-condition-to-the-google-shopping-export"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The field that contains the condition information needs to be added to the product file that is exported to Google."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Export Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Perform Complex Export", "bold": true}, {"text": " and choose "}, {"text": "Use Existing Custom Export Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Google Shopping Data Feed", "bold": true}, {"text": " to edit its format."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed2.05T5g00000w6XUYEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed2.05T5g00000w6XUYEA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 249}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down the page, and you will see the "}, {"text": "File Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab is selected. In the "}, {"text": "File Body - Body", "bold": true}, {"text": " section the condition has been hardcoded as "}, {"text": "new", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed3.05T5g00000w6XW5EAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed3.05T5g00000w6XW5EAM.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This needs to be replaced with the custom field that holds the condition information on the product."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Insert Data Dag", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box and select "}, {"text": "Custom Fields", "bold": true}, {"text": ". A new drop down box will appear to the right."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the custom field you created from this second drop down box (in this example, "}, {"text": "Condition", "bold": true}, {"text": "). A button will appear to the right."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The custom field needs to replace the word "}, {"text": "new", "code": true}, {"text": " in the file body. Highlight "}, {"text": "new", "code": true}, {"text": ", and then click "}, {"text": "Insert", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Be sure to only highlight the word new, and not the spaces before or after."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed4.05T5g00000w6XFUEA2.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddProductConditiontoaGoogleShoppingFeed4.05T5g00000w6XFUEA2.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 246}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your custom field will appear in the body of the file. Scroll down to the bottom of the page and click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
